mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO resource_page (
id,
create_time, update_time,
application_id, page_name, page_code, link_path,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES (
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{pageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )

INSERT INTO resource_page (
id,
create_time, update_time,
application_id, page_name, page_code, link_path,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES
(
#{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{item.applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.pageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.linkPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE resource_page
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
application_id = #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
page_name = #{pageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
page_code = #{pageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
link_path = #{linkPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE resource_page
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
application_id = #{applicationId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
page_name = #{pageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
page_code = #{pageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
link_path = #{linkPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version = #{version, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE resource_page
delete_flag = 1, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
application_id, page_name, page_code, link_path,
delete_flag,
version FROM resource_page WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
application_id, page_name, page_code, link_path,
delete_flag,
version FROM resource_page

SELECT DISTINCT rp.id, rp.application_id, rp.page_name, rp.page_code, rp.link_path FROM user_role_relation urr JOIN role_control_unit_relation rcur ON urr.`role_id` = rcur.`role_id` AND rcur.`delete_flag` = 0 AND rcur.`status` = 'ACTIVATED' JOIN control_unit_resource_relation curr ON rcur.`control_unit_id` = curr.`control_unit_id` AND curr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND curr.`resource_type` = 'PAGE' JOIN resource_page rp ON curr.`resource_id` = rp.`id` AND rp.`delete_flag` = 0 AND rp.`application_id` = #{applicationId} WHERE urr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND urr.`user_id` = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT rp.id, rp.application_id, rp.page_name, rp.page_code, rp.link_path FROM control_unit cu JOIN control_unit_resource_relation curr ON cu.`id` = curr.`control_unit_id` AND curr.`delete_flag` = 0 AND curr.`resource_type` = 'PAGE' JOIN resource_page rp ON curr.`resource_id` = rp.`id` AND rp.`delete_flag` = 0 WHERE cu.delete_flag = 0 AND cu.`landing` = 1 AND cu.`control_unit_scope` = 'PERPETUAL' AND cu.`status` = 'PUBLISHED' AND cu.`application_id` = #{applicationId}
